name: MMEX Resources Corporation
summary: MMEX Resources Corporation, a development stage company, engages in the exploration, extraction, refining, and distribution of oil, gas, petroleum products, and electric power. It focuses on the acquisition, development, and financing of oil, gas, refining and electric power projects in Texas, Peru, and other countries in Latin America. The company was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in Fort Stockton, Texas.
